## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content creation progress and strategy for Jason, Marcel, and DataGrid](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy evolving: Focus on deeper, tactical posts with specific examples](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [New tools in development: Fact-checker and website content scanner for LLM-readiness](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Process improvements: Streamlining post creation workflow and collaboration tools](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Marcel's content: First batch of posts ready for review, aiming for weekly high-quality posts](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Deeper, tactical posts with specific examples perform better than hot takes](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Tagging and collaboration increase post engagement (e.g., mentioning Marcel's account)](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Showcasing Codex tools (like fact-checkers) could be valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Aim for posts that are easy to skim but packed with insights](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### DataGrid Content Progress

  - [Rafid sending reminders for post reviews](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Jason added company account to Assembly for posting](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Plan: Two posts per week, automating engagement after account upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Marcel's Content Creation

  - [Three posts prepared in Notion for Marcel's review](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining Marcel's authentic tone and transparency](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Goal: One high-quality post per week for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### New Tools and Features

  - [Developing a public fact-checker tool](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Creating a website scanner to identify outdated product information for LLM consumption](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [These tools will be launched on Product Hunt and used for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Exploring N8N or Aerops for collaborative content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Need to structure the content creation process for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Planning to create a sales one-pager for the content service](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2732.0)

### Team Expansion Plans

  - [Success with Marcel's posts could lead to expanding the service to 10+ team members](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Demonstrating value through generated leads to justify further investment](https://fathom.video/share/7mw-t1L4UJQnLWvX5dhbEX5Udgp-shF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2715.0)
